Notice Of Motion To Compel Respones To Discovery Requests
Off Calendar Apr-03-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT EXCELLIUM PHARMACEUTICAL, INC., and, MCKESSON CORPORATION'S Motion to Compel Responses to Discovery Requests. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar, discovery motion. Please call and calendar in the discovery department. (302CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Tamara Willat-Harrison, CSR 4609

Defendants Excellium Pharmaceutical, Inc., And Mckesson Corporation'S Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery Request (Erroneusly Set In 302, Moving Papers And Reservation Are For Discovery)
Off Calendar Apr-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Excellium Pharmaceutical, Inc., and McKesson Corporation's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Response To Discovery Requests granted, as follows:
a. All objections are waived except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
b. Plaintiff shall serve full, complete, and verified responses to defendants' Special Interrogatories [Set One], First Demand to Inspect Documents, and Form Interrogatories within seven days of the date of service of this order;
c. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $390.00, payable within thirty days of the date of service of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
